features.name: Data Structure & Video Content
features.description: 66 subjects, 429 video references (241 unique), 144 lessons across 12 grades. All subjects have at least 2+ videos. No more empty video arrays.
features.evidence: All 66 subjects show ✅ in audit. Total: 429 video references.

features.name: Rich Subject Structures
features.description: Toán 10: 95 videos, 33 lessons across 9 chapters. Toán 11/12: split into chapters/lessons. All Lý/Hóa/Sinh 10-12 expanded. Sử/Địa/Anh 10-12 expanded.
features.evidence: Multiple chapters per subject with meaningful lesson names.

features.name: Video Player & Search
features.description: YouTube embed player with autoplay + fullscreen. In-app search with data + YouTube fallback.

features.name: UI/UX Improvements
features.description: Dark mode with localStorage. Back-to-top button. Smooth scroll. Toast notifications. Responsive mobile layout. Animations.

features.name: Deployment Config
features.description: Vercel config, GitHub Actions workflow, README, package.json
